text:
Silent Hill: Townfall Looks Like The Closest Thing We’re Getting To P.T.
Jess Cogswell got to see 15 minutes of Silent Hill Townfall gameplay and learned more about the game, the aggressive enemies, gameplay mechanics and more.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Sprawl Zero Captures the Spirit of Early 2000s Halo Games
We got 30 minutes of hands-on time with Sprawl Zero which has fast paced action, fantastic fluid gunplay, thrumming music and a game that captures the spirit of Halo type games being made in the 2000s.

Timestamps: 
0:00 Intro
1:04 Design Breakdown
1:51 The World and Tone
2:38 Character Abilities
3:15 Final Thoughts

#sprawlzero #sgf #gaming 

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave - Release Date Reveal Gameplay Trailer
Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave comes exclusively to Nintendo Switch 2 on Sept 17, 2026.

In the capital of the Dagdan Empire, powerful fighters gather to participate in the Heroic Games, where the winner is granted one wish.

Hone your techniques at the training grounds, recruit new allies, or travel beyond Dagsion's walls to gain experience. How you spend your free time is up to you.

What is your favorite unit on Fire Emblem?

#FireEmblemFortunesWeave #NintendoDirect #NintendoSwitch2

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time – Official Remake Reveal Trailer
A legend, reborn.

The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 later this year in 2026.

What was your favorite dungeon in Ocarina of Time?

#ocarinaoftime #zeldaocarinaoftime #legendofzelda #remake #gaming #videogames #videojuegos #switch2 #nintendoswitch2 

Follow our curator page on steam:

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
The Duskbloods - Official Network Test Announcement Trailer
A network test for Nintendo Switch 2's "The Duskbloods" has been scheduled for Summer 2026.

This game is a PvPvE-based multiplayer action game featuring battles between up to eight players, as well as player-versus-enemy combat. Players become "Twilight Bloodlines," who have gained superhuman powers through the power of a special bloodline, and are thrust into a fierce battle over the "First Blood."

#duskbloods #switch2 #networktest #gaming #videogames #videojuegos 

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
DO NOT Worry About The Wolf Among Us 2
Jean-Luc got to check out The Wolf Among Us 2 and is happy to report that this is the sequel we've been waiting for. It is shaping up to be exactly what classic Telltale fans expect, but expanded on in meaningful ways.

Be sure to check out the full video on the GameSpot Youtube channel.

#wolfamongus #wolfamongus2 #telltalegames #summergamefest #sgf #impressons 

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Don't Worry. The Wolf Among Us 2 Looks Fantastic
Jean-Luc got a behind closed doors look at the Wolf Among Us 2, and despite the long wait, it's looking to be a worthy sequel to the original Telltale game.

#thewolfamongus2 #telltalegames # sgf #gaming

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Crazy Taxi: World Tour Is MUCH BIGGER Than The OG Game
DISCLAIMER: After the recording of this preview, Crazy Taxi's Steam page went live with a disclosure revealing the developer's usage of generative AI 'support tools.' No specifics were shared regarding the exact usage, except to say, 'No AI was used in reference to the performers in the game.'

Kurt got to see Crazy Taxi World Tour and has a lot to say about it. For more check out the full video on the GameSpot Youtube channel.

#crazytaxi #crazytaxiworldtour #sega #gaming #gameplay #summergamefest #preview #impressions
